allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => typeof l[k] === 'object' && k[0] === k[0].toUpperCase\(\)\); const matches = names.filter\(n => /git|link|mail|globe|extern/i.test\(n\)\); console.log\(matches.sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1)
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(['ArrowUpRight','FolderOpen','Code2'].map\(n => n + ': ' + \(n in l\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(['Download','Briefcase','FileText'].map\(n => n + ': ' + \(n in l\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
